3bc3fdc08b0a.e9b41ac34430: Many brands exhaust their Instagram ad budgets due to high cost per click, interactions not leading to purchases, and difficulty measuring real results. The main challenge is not just generating clicks, but ensuring every visit has potential to become a customer.

Buyer Stage-Based Campaigns

Visuals and copy were tested simultaneously to find the most effective combinations.
7a3bd5630a95.6f3ce6deeddb:
